title: The Repair Verdict
description: Usopp’s attachment to the Going Merry turns the repair verdict into a personal crisis that separates him emotionally from the crew.
scene: Across pages 18, 19, 20, 21, this part follows Luffy, Nami, Usopp, Zoro, Sanji. Usopp’s attachment to the Going Merry turns the repair verdict into a personal crisis that separates him emotionally from the crew.

dialogue.speaker: Kaku
dialogue.text: Weren't you with the frankly earlier?

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: more pre-cisely, they were carry- ing him.

dialogue.speaker: Kaku
dialogue.text: Hey!! Where do the franklys live!?

dialogue.speaker: Kaku
dialogue.text: Go from where you docked your ship...

dialogue.speaker: Kaku
dialogue.text: And then go northeast along the beach.

dialogue.speaker: Kaku
dialogue.text: There's no time to find him...

dialogue.speaker: Kaku
dialogue.text: that would be too Dan- Geros.

summary: Usopp’s attachment to the Going Merry turns the repair verdict into a personal crisis that separates him emotionally from the crew.
